goals.title: Build an optional Andes RTL DB LLM Wiki / knowledge graph under /User...
goals.objective: Build an optional Andes RTL DB LLM Wiki / knowledge graph under /Users/brian/Desktop/andes and common_ai_agent integration so agents can consult it like pcie/nvme/ucie skills. Use pyslang AST-level extraction for RTL constructs including modules, ports, parameters, FSMs, datapaths, registers, memories, features, clocks, resets; convert existing docs into LLM wiki pages; support on/off via environment/config; provide reusable script and guide for other RTL DBs; verify with RED→GREEN tests and real usage scenarios.
